description: Write a passing test for an existing function.
prompt: There's a function `is_even(n)` in numbers.py. Write a unittest test file `test_numbers.py` with at least 2 test methods that cover True and False cases. Running `python3 -m unittest test_numbers` must report OK.
setup:
cat > numbers.py <<'PY'
def is_even(n):
    return n % 2 == 0
PY
check: test -f test_numbers.py && grep -q 'is_even' test_numbers.py && python3 -m unittest test_numbers 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q OK
